title: Add Wave 20 manager login/session regression matrix
description: Expand QA coverage for login-first bootstrap, auth/me introspection, and manager auth guard transitions while preserving Wave 16-19 manager baselines.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix includes login success/failure, auth/me success, and expired/invalid token cases
API tests assert auth-session-v1 contract stability for auth/me and related errors
Wave 16-19 manager regressions remain stable after Wave 20 additions
